message:
feat: Add numpy random, fft, and percentile support to WASM variant

Compile and statically link numpy.random (9 Cython modules + distributions +
bit generators) and numpy.fft (_pocketfft_umath C++) into python-numpy.wasm.

Key fix: Cython modules need -DCYTHON_COMPRESS_STRINGS=0 since zlib is
unavailable in WASI. FFT links -lc++ for the C++ pocketfft implementation.

Binary grows from 8.7MB to 13.4MB. All 20 tests pass (8 numpy + 12 real-world).
